nasb.text: Then I looked, and behold, a likeness as the appearance of a man; from His loins and downward there was the appearance of fire, and from His loins and upward the appearance of brightness, like the appearance of glowing metal.

esv.text: Then I looked, and behold, a form that had the appearance of a man.  Below what appeared to be his waist was fire, and above his waist was something like the appearance of brightness, like gleaming metal.

cnv.text: 我觀看，見有一形狀好像人的樣子，在那仿佛是他腰部以下，有火的樣子，在那仿佛是他腰部的以上有光輝的樣子，好像閃耀的金屬。

ccb.text: 我观看，只见有一位形状像人，祂的腰部以下像火，腰部以上像闪亮的金属。
